symptom: submit button stays disabled after a valid card is entered
root_cause: isValid was derived from a stale ref, not the live field state
what_worked: bound validity to the live form state instead of the ref
what_failed: first patched the button's disabled prop directly - wrong layer, the validity was upstream

symptom: chart renders empty in production but fine locally
root_cause: data fetched client-side without the prod auth header
what_failed: could not reproduce in local env (no prod auth); added a unit test around the header path and routed to someone who can observe prod
